description: Fired when a user views an activity detail page
Fired when a user clicks the Reserve button on an activity detail page
Fired when a user successfully creates a reservation for an activity
Fired when a user joins the waitlist queue for a fully booked activity
Fired when an organiser successfully creates a new activity
Fired when an organiser successfully updates an existing activity
Fired when a user submits a review for an activity
Fired when a user accepts a queue slot that became available
Fired when a user declines a queue slot that became available
Fired when an organiser saves changes to their organisation profile
Fired when a user applies a category filter on the home page activity map
Fired when a user performs a search on mobile for activities
